title: Wayland Optimized
description: A simple Minecraft modpack focusing on performance and graphics enhancements on wayland linux.
body:
Minecraft build created for optimization on the Linux system using Wayland. 
The modpack contains such mods as:
- sodium
- wayfix
- async
- voxy(beta)
 
The build was tested on a Xeon e5 2673V3 CPU, 16 GB RAM. Good luck for using. 

I use fedora btw <3
